printed.name: Leg Circles
printed.setup: Lying supine, arms down by sides, one leg straight up to ceiling, foot dorsiflexed, other leg on Mat, foot plantarflexed

movement.inhale: Bring leg across center line, circle down and around
movement.exhale:
Repeat circle, same direction
Reverse direction after 5 repetitions

cues: Keep circles within range of pelvic lumbar control
